ops.body: Resolved. Round-3 report was a red herring: the binary WAS installed and working on yasyf-home (which cc-present is empty by design — binary lives at $PLUGIN_ROOT/bin, never on PATH). Root-caused the undiagnosability instead: session-start.sh discarded all installer output (>/dev/null 2>&1 || true) and curl had no timeout flags. Fix shipped via the CENTRAL template (cc-interact plugin-template commit 094035c7: v-prefix guard ported back, curl --connect-timeout 10 --max-time 60, installer output tee'd to $ROOT/install-binary.log), propagated to cc-present (3cdfc8b0 + 6486b293), released as v0.2.1 (goreleaser green, assets live, cask bumped). Re-verified on yasyf-home: hardened hook downloaded real v0.2.1 asset, install-binary.log written with success lines, test -x passes, --version = 0.2.1. Also corrected: default SessionStart hook budget is 600s, not 60s.
